sections.paragraph:
οἰκονομικός (οἰκονομικός, ή, όν)

practised in the management of a household or family, Plat., etc.: hence, thrifty, frugal, economical, Xen.:— ὁ οἰκ. title of a treatise on the duties of domestic life, by Xen.; and τὰ οἰκονομικά, a similar treatise by Arist.: ἡ -κή (sc. τέχνη), domestic economy, Plat., Xen., etc.


Etym. from οἰκονόμος
